title: P2: Home/Depreciation forms (8829, 4562, 6198)
description: Form 8829 Home Office, Form 4562 Depreciation/Amortization, Form 6198 At-Risk Limitations. Complex forms with multiple worksheets.

title: P2: Credits & Family forms (8839, 8396, 8615, 8332)
description: Form 8839 Adoption Credit, Form 8396 Mortgage Interest Credit, Form 8615 Child Unearned Income, Form 8332 Release of Exemption. Wire into F1040 Schedule 3.

title: P2: Investment forms (6781, 8824, 6252, 8283, 8379)
description: Form 6781 Section 1256, Form 8824 Like-Kind Exchange, Form 6252 Installment Sale, Form 8283 Noncash Contributions, Form 8379 Injured Spouse. Wire into Schedule D, 1040.

title: P2: Retirement forms (8606, 5329, 8880)
description: Form 8606 Nondeductible IRAs/Roth conversions, Form 5329 Early Distribution Penalties, Form 8880 Retirement Savings Credit. Extend F1040Attachment in Y2025/irsForms/. Wire into F1040.ts. Tests in Y2025/tests/.

title: P4: Depreciation engine & business deep
description: Full Form 4562 with 8 variants, Section 179, MACRS tables. Enhanced crypto support for 20K+ transactions. Stock option handling (ISO/NSO/ESPP via 3921/3922).

title: P6: E-Filing & Payment
description: IRS MeF XML generation (Pub 4164), state e-file, Form 8879 e-sign, direct deposit split (8888), estimated tax (1040-ES), extension e-file (4868), refund tracking, installment setup (9465).

title: P3: State Tax Engine - Flat tax states (PA, MI, NC, MA)
description: Implement real state form logic for flat-tax states. PA Form PA-40 (3.07%), MI Form MI-1040 (4.05%), NC Form D-400 (4.5%), MA Form 1 (5%). Build reusable state form base class.

title: P3: State Tax Engine - Major states (CA, NY, NJ, GA, VA, OH)
description: Implement progressive-tax state forms. CA Form 540 (9 brackets), NY IT-201 (8 brackets), NJ-1040 (7 brackets), GA Form 500, VA Form 760, OH IT-1040. Most complex phase.

title: P2: Amendment & Extension forms (1040X, 4868, 2210, 9465)
description: Form 1040X Amended Return, Form 4868 Extension Filing, Form 2210 Underpayment Penalty, Form 9465 Installment Agreement. These need data types in core/data, form classes, F1040 wiring, tests.

title: P2: Self-Employment forms (7206, Sched F, Sched H)
description: Form 7206 Self-Employed Health Insurance, Schedule F Farm Income, Schedule H Household Employment Taxes. Each extends F1040Attachment, wired through F1040 and Schedule 1/SE.

title: P5: Import & UX infrastructure
description: W-2 EIN lookup import, 1099 broker CSV import (Fidelity/Schwab/Vanguard), crypto CSV import, prior year data import, PDF upload, guided interview wizard, tax planning mode, refund estimator.

title: P2: K-1 Pass-through input (1120-S K-1, 1041 K-1)
description: Add K-1 data types to core/data. Create K-1 input components. Wire K-1 income to Schedule E and other schedules.
